messages.content:
City Town of New Haven Borough (Name of Municipality) Democrat (Party) September 12, 2023 (Date of Primary) NAME(S) OF CANDIDATE(S) (Note: provide sufficient space) Thomas A. Goldenberg ADDRESS 324 Nicoll Street OFFICE(S) SOUGHT Mayor TERM 1/1/24–12/31/25 THIS PETITION MUST BE FILED WITH Shannel Evans, 200 Orange Street #201, New Haven, 06510 (Name of Registrar of Voters) (Address of said Registrar) , not later than 4:00 p.m. on August 9, 2023. B. We, the undersigned, being enrolled members of the above party in the above municipality, do hereby petition that there be printed on the voting machine ballot labels to be used in the primary of said party in said municipality to be held on the date above specified the names of the above individuals as candidates for nomination to the offices specified:
SIGNATURE OF ENROLLED ELECTOR PRINTED NAME OF ELECTOR BIRTH DATE STREET ADDRESS
1 Richard A. Lee 2/24/1945 70 LYON ST
2 Peter E. Strauch 6/13/1933 78 LYON ST
3 John Stachniwicz 11/13/1965 74 Lyon
4 Shane Bales 07/09/1958 74 Lyon
